title: Industrucdium
description:
*A Mod that adds new materials and tools.  Works with apple skin.




*make sure to set your key binds for day/night cycle and exp give. auto set is z day x night and r exp give
body:
A mod that adds new overpowered materials and tools, such as Industrucdium and Unbrakium. Unbrakium allows you to fly in survival! and it adds new key binds that you need to set otherwise they will automatically set as R for exp give, Z for changing the time to day, and X for night. Download today to have fun with your friends and put a smile on my face. I'm a new modder I'm only 12 so downloading it will help me make more mods and add-ons. I made it just for people to have fun.* Works with Apple skin in single-player. use it with this mod [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/health-overlay](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/health-overlay)





*remember to run it with forge 47.2.0 otherwise it will not work.
